title: Notifications
subtitle: Manage push channels, event subscriptions and templates in one place

list.empty: No channels yet — pick a kind above to get started

telegram.name: Telegram
telegram.description: Push to a Telegram chat or group via a bot

chat_id.label: Chat ID
chat_id.help: User or group chat ID (groups start with -)

discord.name: Discord
discord.description: Push to a Discord channel via webhook

webhook_url.label: Webhook URL
webhook_url.help: Get it from the channel integration settings

bark.name: Bark
bark.description: iOS push via the Bark app

device_key.label: Device key
device_key.help: Device key from the Bark app

send_key.label: SendKey
send_key.help: Get it from the ServerChan dashboard

node_offline.name: Node offline
node_offline.description: Heartbeat timed out N times in a row

traffic_threshold.name: Traffic threshold
traffic_threshold.description: Monthly usage crossed the configured threshold

subscription_sync_failed.name: Subscription sync failed
subscription_sync_failed.description: Could not fetch or parse a subscription source

login_anomaly.name: Login anomaly
login_anomaly.description: Sign-in from a new device or unusual IP

script_alert.name: Script alert
script_alert.description: A user script raised an error or alert

form.no_config_needed: No extra config required for this kind
form.events_hint: Bulk-edit via the matrix on the right

matrix.title: Event subscriptions
matrix.subtitle: Rows = events, columns = channels. Check to fan-out.
matrix.empty: Create at least one channel before subscribing to events

template.title: Message template
template.subtitle: Go template syntax; leave empty for the default

history.title: Delivery history
history.subtitle: Last 30 days of event triggers and push results
history.empty_description: Triggered events will appear here once they fire

page.delete_confirm_description: Delete "{{name}}"? Subscriptions tied to it will be removed. This cannot be undone.
page.select_hint: Select a channel on the left to see its details

telegram_redirect: Configure two-way Telegram bot in the Bot Settings page

telegram.page_description: Configure the bot to receive alerts and answer 5 commands (/nodes /refresh /agent_restart /traffic /silent)
telegram.title: Bot webhook configuration
telegram.description: Telegram POSTs updates to this URL; it embeds a secret token — keep it private.

webhook.label: Public webhook URL
webhook.hint: Copy into BotFather, or click "Install on Telegram" to call setWebhook automatically

install.label: Telegram setWebhook target URL
install.hint: Installing calls the Telegram setWebhook API; admin only.

bindings.title: Bound chat IDs
bindings.empty: No chats bound yet. Send "/start <token>" to the bot from Telegram to bind one.
bindings.hint: Users send "/start <userID>:<channelID>" in Telegram to bind the current chat to a channel.

errors.load_failed: Failed to load Telegram bot status
